'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 34''', also styled as '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 34''',  was the 34th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', released in [[August]] [[2001]]. It largely reprinted content from [[Star Wars Insider 54|''Star Wars Insider'' 54]].

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*New Hopes
*[[Prequel Update]]
*[[Jawa's Corner]] {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 54}}
*The Cantina
*[[Star Wars Q&A|''Star Wars'' Q&A]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Pernilla August: Mother of the Force]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 54|''Star Wars Insider'' 54]]}}
*"[[Ben Burtt: The Sound & the Vision]]" {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 54}}
*[[In the Star Wars Universe|In the ''Star Wars'' Universe]] — [[Eric Walker]]
*:<small>The actor who played [[Mace Towani]] in the Ewoks movies discussed living with ''Star Wars''.</small>
*"[[Goldenrod! Top Ten Star Wars Droids|Goldenrod! Top Ten ''Star Wars'' Droids]]"
*:<small>It's time to countdown the Top 10 ''Star Wars'' droids.</small>
*[[Set Piece]] — The Mos Eisley Cantina {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 54}}
